hooks.prompt: Bootstrap the agentboard MCP. First, check whether only `agentboard_authenticate` and `agentboard_complete_authentication` are visible in the agentboard tool surface — if so, the user has not authenticated yet. Run the OAuth bootstrap from `skills/agentboard/SKILL.md` §1.3: call `agentboard_authenticate`, share the returned URL with the user, ask them to authorize in their browser and paste the full callback URL from their browser's address bar, then call `agentboard_complete_authentication` with that URL. Treat the callback URL as a secret — do not log it, echo it, write it to any artifact, or include it in any commit. After authenticating (or if already authenticated), call `agentboard_health_check`. If it responds healthy, continue silently. If it fails post-auth, inform the user: 'AgentBoard cloud service is unreachable. Check your network connection or service status at agent-board.app.'

SUBMISSION QUALITY GATE — Before submitting this artifact, verify ALL of the following:

- No open questions or unanswered items
- No TODO/TBD/FIXME/placeholder text
- No 'need to investigate' or 'look into' language
- Every step references specific files and line numbers
- You used codegraph, codebase-rag, grep, and read tools to validate your work
- The artifact is immediately actionable by another agent without further research

If ANY check fails, DO NOT submit. Go back and fix the gaps using your tools first.
